title: WorkspaceSnapshot
description: Visibility-scoped collaboration workspace read contract. This schema freezes shell ownership, mounted object anchor, route-visible workspace versioning, one authoritative route-stability contract, route-context return/fallback posture, visibility-scoped lane-head guards, dominant-question continuity, settlement posture, low-noise shell structure, mounted module set, permissions, and participant read posture for staff and customer collaboration routes.
